metadata.description: 个人 Claude Skills 集合

plugins.name: git-guardrails-claude-code
plugins.description: Set up Claude Code hooks to block dangerous git commands before they execute

plugins.name: ubiquitous-language
plugins.description: Extract a DDD-style ubiquitous language glossary from conversation

plugins.name: write-a-prd
plugins.description: Create a PRD through user interview, codebase exploration, and module design, saved locally

plugins.name: gh-pr-code-review
plugins.description: GitHub PR Code Review with project-specific customization via interactive setup

plugins.name: test-driven-development
plugins.description: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code

plugins.name: brainstorming
plugins.description: Use before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior

plugins.name: write-a-skill
plugins.description: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment
